name: Jupiter
tagline: Solana swap aggregator and price API — free tier, no key to start.
description: Jupiter routes and executes token swaps across Solana DEX liquidity and exposes Swap (quote/swap), Price, and Token REST APIs. A keyless tier lets an agent fetch quotes and prices immediately; a single Developer Platform key raises rate limits across every Jupiter API.

methods.label: Keyless (lite tier)
methods.note: lite-api.jup.ag needs no key — good for prototyping and low volume.

methods.label: Developer Platform key
methods.note: One key from the Jupiter Developer Platform unlocks higher rate limits across every Jupiter API.

auth.guide:
**Keyless (start here):** the lite tier needs no credential. Fetch a price or a swap quote directly:

```bash
curl 'https://lite-api.jup.ag/price/v3?ids=So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112'
curl 'https://lite-api.jup.ag/swap/v1/quote?inputMint=So111...112&outputMint=EPjF...Dt1v&amount=100000000&slippageBps=50'
```

**Developer Platform key (production):** create a key at the [Jupiter Developer Platform](https://developers.jup.ag/portal) and send it against the production host `https://api.jup.ag` in the `x-api-key` header. The same key works across Swap, Price, and Token APIs:

```bash
curl 'https://api.jup.ag/price/v3?ids=So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112' \
  -H 'x-api-key: $JUP_API_KEY'
```

A missing/invalid key on `api.jup.ag` returns `401`. Keep keys in a secrets vault, not in committed config.

interfaces.name: Jupiter API (lite, keyless)
interfaces.note: Keyless tier. Swap quote at /swap/v1/quote, price at /price/v3. Rate-limited; no OpenAPI spec published.

interfaces.name: Jupiter API (keyed)
interfaces.note: Production host. One Developer Platform key raises limits across Swap/Price/Token APIs; invalid key returns 401.
